title: Billing is dashboard-only — there is no PAT endpoint that changes a subscription
summary: Every billing capability (plan, usage, invoices, subscribe/change/cancel, Stripe portal) lives behind session-auth /dashboard/plans/* routes (require_tenant_member), NOT the PAT path brands.py uses. A workspace agent therefore cannot read or mutate billing programmatically — it must READ the read-only subscription signal on getBrand and REDIRECT to app.spideriq.ai/dashboard/plans. Enforcement of spend happens in the Dispatcher: 429 (cost_ceiling_usd_per_24h, has Retry-After) and 402 (monthly_spend_cap_usd, no Retry-After).
references: app/api/v1/dashboard_plans.py — prefix=/dashboard/plans, all routes require_tenant_member (session, not PAT)
skills/workspace/references/gaps.md — RFC B1–B4 for client billing-VIEW PAT endpoints (follow-up)
Stripe Agent Toolkit — billing via portal sessions, read-first/write-narrow — https://docs.stripe.com/mcp
